actors.text: A 95% CI for p1 - p2 (city A minus city B support) is (-0.04, 0.18). Does the data support 'the cities differ'?
Yes -- the interval is mostly positive
actors.reflection: Direction of most values doesn't decide. The interval includes 0, so we can't rule out NO difference.

actors.text: No -- the interval contains 0, so we cannot conclude the proportions differ

actors.reflection: Confidence level describes the METHOD's capture rate, not certainty about this specific question. With 0 in the interval, the data are consistent with no difference.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
